kill_chain.technique: T1557.001 LLMNR/NBT-NS Poisoning and SMB Relay
kill_chain.description: 10.10.0.40 broadcast LLMNR lookups (incl. wpad); 10.10.0.41 poisoned each with its own IP, then 10.10.0.40 authenticated to 10.10.0.41 over SMB — a Responder-style NTLM capture.

iocs.expected_signal: dns.log LLMNR answer=10.10.0.41 (a workstation) from a non-DNS host, then SMB 10.10.0.40->10.10.0.41

malicious_flows.technique: T1557.001 LLMNR/NBT-NS Poisoning and SMB Relay
